trivia: The shortened Fokker 100 arrived just as Fokker collapsed, so only 47 were built. A tiny faithful band of operators kept them flying decades past their maker.
Catching a Fokker 70 means catching an airframe from a company that no longer exists, aviation's ghost signals.
funFacts: Fokker went bankrupt in 1996, three years after its first flight.
